data.title: Chicago Gourmet 2025 powered by Invesco QQQ features a sports-themed culinary lineup, tickets on sale July 25.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, the renowned Chicago Gourmet event, supported by Invesco QQQ, is back with an exciting sports-themed culinary program. Tickets for the event will be available for purchase starting on the same day. Invesco QQQ has taken on the role of the title sponsor, showcasing its commitment to innovation in collaboration with the Illinois Restaurant Association and a host of other partners.

Malnutrition and starvation are stalking Gaza – and children are the most at risk. Experts say that even if aid – which has dwindled to a trickle – started to come in, the physical effects could wreck a generation. CGTN’s Michael Marillier reports.

data.title: JAKKS Pacific introduces new toys at San Diego Comic-Con 2025: SUPER MARIO, THE SIMPSONS, DC X SONIC THE HEDGEHOG, BENDY, DOG MAN.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Santa Monica, California, JAKKS Pacific, Inc. (NASDAQ: JAKK) revealed a new lineup at San Diego Comic-Con. The lineup draws inspiration from famous franchises such as Super Mario, The Simpsons, DC x Sonic the Hedgehog, Bendy, and Dog Man.

data.title: Pathward Financial (NASDAQ: CASH) to announce earnings with estimated EPS of $1.64 on July 28, 2025. Investors anticipate positive outcomes.
data.description: Pathward Financial (NASDAQ: CASH) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on Monday, July 28, 2025. Analysts forecast an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.64 for the company. Investors are eager to hear the announcement, anticipating results that exceed expectations and optimistic guidance for the upcoming quarter. This information can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Rockford Fosgate launches next-gen TMS direct replacement motorcycle speakers, including 6.5-inch ones for 2024+ models.
data.description: In Tempe, Arizona, on July 25, 2025, Rockford Fosgate, a top provider of high-performance audio systems, has announced the launch of its latest line of TMS direct replacement motorcycle speakers. These speakers are now being shipped and are offered in various options, including the 6.5-inch size for 2024+ Models such as TMS24-65 and TMS14-65. Interested customers can find more details on these products on the Rockford Fosgate website.

data.title: Project Veritas drops lawsuit against NYT.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the global market value of renewable energy reached a record high of $928.0 billion last year. This marks a significant increase of 6.8% compared to the previous year. The growth was mainly driven by investments in wind and solar projects, with solar energy accounting for the largest share of investments. The report also highlights a shift towards sustainable investments, with renewable energy now making up over 40% of the world's total power capacity. This trend is expected to continue, as countries and companies increasingly prioritize clean energy sources to combat climate change.

data.title: Producers selling packaging in Colorado must report supply data by July 31 to comply with EPR law.
data.description: In order to comply with Colorado's Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) law, producers selling packaging, paper products, and food serviceware within the state must submit supply data to the Circular Action Alliance (CAA) by July 31, 2025. This reporting requirement aims to enhance transparency and accountability in the management of these products. Failure to adhere to this deadline may result in penalties or non-compliance fees. This initiative is part of efforts to promote sustainable practices and reduce environmental impact, with a focus on improving recycling rates and waste management. The CAA serves as a key entity in overseeing and enforcing these regulations to ensure alignment with state laws and sustainability goals. Actively engaging with these reporting obligations supports the state's objectives in creating a more eco-conscious and responsible business environment.

data.title: C3.ai CEO Siebel stepping down for health reasons. Possibility of acquisition as AI stock fell on Thursday.
data.description: The stock price of AI dropped on Thursday following an announcement by software company C3.ai that CEO Thomas Siebel will be resigning due to health reasons. Analysts speculate that there may be a potential acquisition in the works.
Brent Crude futures settle at $68.44/bbl, down 74 cents, 1.07%.

data.title: Inventor from Scottsdale, Ariz., creates RE - BAR attachment for strength training machines.
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona, on July 25, 2025, an inventor shared their inspiration behind creating a new accessory for strength-training equipment. The inventor introduced the revolutionary RE - BAR, aimed at facilitating a range of exercises efficiently. This innovative design caters to diverse workout needs.

data.title: Dragonfly defends DOJ scrutiny over Tornado Cash investment, ready to fight back against potential legal action.
data.description: A venture capital firm known as Dragonfly Capital, by making an early investment in Tornado Cash, may face legal consequences from the Department of Justice. This decision has put the firm at risk of potential legal action. The specifics of the investment and potential repercussions have garnered attention, with the involvement of the DOJ adding a significant layer of complexity to the situation. This highlights the potential ramifications of investing in such projects, with Dragonfly Capital now in a precarious position due to their investment choice.

data.title: Spear AI receives seed funding from Scare the Bear Capital & Cortical Ventures to boost maritime AI solutions.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Washington, Spear AI, a prominent creator of maritime artificial intelligence technologies, revealed the successful finalization of its seed funding round. This round gathered investments from Scare the Bear Capital and Cortical Ventures. The funding secured will assist the company in further developing its innovative solutions and expanding its reach in the maritime sector.

data.title: Former BlackRock exec, key in launching Bitcoin, Ethereum ETFs, joins SharpLink Gaming as co-CEO. Exciting news for both companies.
data.description: The head of cryptocurrency at BlackRock, a prominent financial company, is departing to assume the role of co-CEO at SharpLink Gaming, which manages the treasury for Ethereum. This significant move reflects the growing influence of cryptocurrency in the financial industry.

data.title: Indiana State University partners with Thompson Thrift, renaming construction management department in a historic collaboration.
data.description: In a significant development on July 25, 2025, in Terre Haute, Indiana, Thompson Thrift, a prominent name in the real estate sector, made a historic donation to Indiana State University. This generous gift aims to foster innovation, enhance educational opportunities, and promote collaboration within the construction management field. The partnership between the university and Thompson Thrift is set to revolutionize the industry, with a focus on advancing key areas such as research, training, and practical application. This initiative signifies a new chapter in construction management, with the potential to impact not only academia but also the wider business landscape. Through this collaboration, both entities aim to drive growth, excellence, and transformation in the construction sector, setting new benchmarks for industry engagement and progress.

data.title: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, ADA, HYPE, XLM, SUI at risk as Bitcoin may drop below $115,000, halting the altcoin season.
data.description: The support level for Bitcoin is currently at $115,000, with the possibility of a breakout that could halt the ongoing altcoin season.
